messages.content: 🏗️ No team yet — casting one based on your project...

Team proposed:

🏗️  Keyser     — Lead Architect  ECS, DOD, decisions
👤  McManus    — Gameplay Engineer Rhythm, scoring, obstacles
👤  Fenster    — Tools Engineer  Audio, beatmap pipeline
⚙️  Hockney    — Platform Engineer CMake, CI, WebAssembly
🧪  Verbal     — QA Engineer     Tests, edge cases
📋  Scribe     — (silent)        Memory, decisions, session logs
🔄  Ralph      — (monitor)       Work queue, backlog, keep-alive

Universe: The Usual Suspects
Look good? Type **y** to confirm or **n** to cancel.
📌 Routing your message to the team now...

I looked at `README.md`. It describes **SHAPESHIFTER**, a C++20/raylib/EnTT rhythm bullet-hell game, with build/run commands, controls, ECS architecture, beatmap generation tools, dependencies, and CI targets.
